description: Screenshot of body text from a news article (Wall Street Journal, per the tweet), set in a serif typeface on a white background with one hyperlinked phrase ('steel and aluminum') shown in blue underlined text. The captured paragraphs report that Ellwood Group, a Pennsylvania maker of forged steel, nickel and aluminum products, saw sales jump 35% from Q4 to Q1 driven in part by tariffs, that customers are 'reshoring' to derisk foreign supply chains, that the Trump administration imposed 25% tariffs on steel and aluminum in March, and that Ellwood is adding staff and anticipates higher profit-sharing. There is no agency design, seal, slogan or graphic overlay; it is cropped article text.
notable_text: Ellwood Group ... saw sales jump 35% ... driven in part by tariffs ... reshoring because they want to derisk foreign supply chains.
